languages.text: "Теперь ты мой, Иждриг. Твоя жизнь, да даже твоя душа — всецело принадлежат мне. Клянись мне кровью — и твой полк никогда не попадет в лапы комиссаров или знати".
"You are mine now, Izdrig. Your life, even your soul, belongs to me. Swear on my blood, and your regiment will never fall into the clutches of Commissars or nobles."
languages.original_text: "Теперь ты мой, Иждриг. Твоя жизнь, да даже твоя душа — всецело принадлежат мне. Клянись мне кровью — и твой полк никогда не попадет в лапы комиссаров или знати".

traits.locale_text: "You are mine now, Izdrig. Your life, even your soul, belongs to me. Swear on my blood, and your regiment will never fall into the clutches of Commissars or nobles."
"You are mine now, Izdrig. Your life, even your soul, belongs to me. Swear on my blood, and your regiment will never fall into the clutches of Commissars or nobles."

"You are mine now, Izdrig. Your life, even your soul, belongs to me. Swear on my blood, and your regiment will never fall into the clutches of Commissars or nobles."

languages.text: 「これからはお前は俺のものだ、イズドリグ。お前の命も、魂さえも、すべて俺のものだ。俺の血に誓え。そうすれば、お前の連隊がコミッサーや貴族の手中に落ちることは決してない。」
languages.original_text: "You are mine now, Izdrig. Your life, even your soul, belongs to me. Swear on my blood, and your regiment will never fall into the clutches of Commissars or nobles."

traits.locale_text: 「これからはお前は俺のものだ、イズドリグ。お前の命も、魂さえも、すべて俺のものだ。俺の血に誓え。そうすれば、お前の連隊がコミッサールや貴族の手中に落ちることは決してない。」

languages.text: « Vous êtes à moi, Izdrig. Vous m'appartenez corps et âme, maintenant. Jurez sur mon sang et votre régiment ne tombera jamais entre les griffes des commissaires ou des nobles. »
languages.original_text: "You are mine now, Izdrig. Your life, even your soul, belongs to me. Swear on my blood, and your regiment will never fall into the clutches of Commissars or nobles."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes à moi, Izdrig. Vous m'appartenez corps et âme, maintenant. Jurez sur mon sang et votre régiment ne tombera jamais entre les griffes des commissaires ou des nobles. »

languages.text: "Artık benimsin İzdrig. Hayatın, hatta ruhun bile bana ait. Kanım üzerine yemin et, alayın asla Komiserlerin veya soyluların pençesine düşmesin."
languages.original_text: "You are mine now, Izdrig. Your life, even your soul, belongs to me. Swear on my blood, and your regiment will never fall into the clutches of Commissars or nobles."

traits.locale_text: "Artık benimsin İzdrig. Hayatın, hatta ruhun bile bana ait. Kanım üzerine yemin et, alayın asla Komiserlerin veya soyluların pençesine düşmesin."

languages.text: "Ihr gehört jetzt mir, Izdrig. Das gilt für Euer Leben und Eure Seele. Schwört auf mein Blut, und Euer Regiment fällt niemals in die Hände von Kommissaren oder Adeligen."
languages.original_text: "You are mine now, Izdrig. Your life, even your soul, belongs to me. Swear on my blood, and your regiment will never fall into the clutches of Commissars or nobles."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr gehört jetzt mir, Izdrig. Das gilt für Euer Leben und Eure Seele. Schwört auf mein Blut, und Euer Regiment fällt niemals in die Hände von Kommissaren oder Adeligen."

languages.text: «Ahora es mío, Izdrig. Su vida; su alma, incluso, me pertenecen. Jure por mi sangre y su regimientos jamás caerá en manos de Comisarios ni nobles».
languages.original_text: "You are mine now, Izdrig. Your life, even your soul, belongs to me. Swear on my blood, and your regiment will never fall into the clutches of Commissars or nobles."

traits.locale_text: «Ahora es mío, Izdrig. Su vida; su alma, incluso, me pertenecen. Jure por mi sangre y su regimientos jamás caerá en manos de Comisarios ni nobles».

languages.text: “你现在归我了，伊兹德里格。你的生命，乃至你的灵魂，都归属于我。以我的鲜血立誓，你的军团就永远不会落入政委或贵族之手。”
languages.original_text: "You are mine now, Izdrig. Your life, even your soul, belongs to me. Swear on my blood, and your regiment will never fall into the clutches of Commissars or nobles."

traits.locale_text: “你现在归我了，伊兹德里格。你的生命，乃至你的灵魂，都归属于我。以我的鲜血立誓，你的军团就永远不会落入政委或贵族之手。”
